title: Fix tab order when manually adding time tracking session

Description
The tab order for the time fields in the “Add session” dialog of the time tracking component should be fixed.

posts.author: piorkowd (Daniel Piorkowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The tab order for the time fields in the “Add session” dialog of the time tracking component should be fixed.

What are you trying to achieve

When manually entering the “Start at” for a time tracking session, pressing tab on the keyboard should navigate to the “End at” field.
